creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
I see bug 259952. 

Without reopening this bug 258268, a thought: 

    PkgBase

– on the Technology Roadmap, 
  <https://freebsdfoundation.org/blog/technology-roadmap/>. 

Here, with an (alpha) PkgBase repository enabled, a preliminary test result shows an error in response to: 

/usr/local/share/wine/pkg32.sh upgrade
